---
title: "How to Make a Data Dictionary"
pagetitle: "How to Make a Data Dictionary"
date: "2026-02-09"
date-title: "Date Added"
author: "Danika Pfeiffer"
author-title: "Contributor"
short-description: "This guide walks you through how to make data dictionaries to describe your datasets and make them easier to understand and reuse."
resource-link: "https://help.osf.io/article/217-how-to-make-a-data-dictionary"
categories:
 - Guide
 - Open Data
editor: source
---

----
## About this Resource
{{< meta short-description >}}
\

[Visit Resource]({{< meta resource-link >}}){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn role="button" data-toggle="button"}
